name: Peanut Butter-Vanilla Squares
recipeInstructions:
Melt the candy coating in a large heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently. Remove from heat and stir in the cereal and remaining ingredients. Stir gently until the morsels are partially melted. Spoon the mixture into a greased 9-inch square pan. Let cool completely; cut into squares. Yield: 3 dozen.
Source: Southern Living 5-Star Collection
